title: Chennai Anthem by Simbu Vanthaarai Vazhavaikum Ooru Lyrics Mathil Mel Poonai
stanzas:
Singer: : Simbu
Music : Ganesh Ragavendra
Movie: Mathil Mel Poonai

Vanthaarai vaazhavaikum ooru
aaduna aappu vaikum paaru
olachaaka soru podum ooru..
adichu nee mela mela yaeru

machi valathu kaala vachi, vanangi vaada machi
thuppuraanda mela echi

machi nammaku venaam katchi
vaangi vaada bajji
paaka povom pagal kaatchi

Vanthaarai vaazhavaikum ooru
aaduna aappu vaikum paaru … machi …
olachaaka soru podum ooru..
adichu nee mela mela yaeru

Indha ooru peoples ellam
nallavanga naalum therinjavanga
sondha bandham yethum illa
aana paasakaara payapullanga..

Figure pesum english vaarthai
oru elavum puriyalaye
namma ooru english teacher,
sariyaaga padikalaye

aadu aadu oodu oodu,paadu paadu kondaadu
koodu koodu thaedu theadu naalum kuthaadu

podu podu podu podu kaadu karuvaadu
naadu naadu moodu moodu
kaathula parakuthu panpaadu

Vanthaarai vaazhavaikum ooru
aaduna aappu vaikum paaru

Enga suthi ada enga vandhom
manda kaanji pochu ada mudiyalada
kaiyula kaasu theerum munnae
oora paathu poi seranuda

Ena petha mummy daddy intha ooril porakalaye
cowboy jeans pottu maadu maeika mudiyalaye

cellu cellu billu billu kallu kallu sengalu
mullu mullu kallu mullu engum housefull-u

nillu nillu vellu vellu dhille dhille kuraiyathe
sollu sollu thillu thillu mullu kotaiyil neeyum kudiyeru

Vanthaarai vaazhavaikum ooru
aaduna aappu vaikum paaru
olachaaka soru podum ooru..
adichu nee mela mela yaeru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Chennai Anthem celebrates the vibrant culture and spirit of Chennai, highlighting the city's unique characteristics and lifestyle.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Mathil Mel Poonai, the song serves as a lively representation of the protagonist's connection to the city and its people.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Simbu and composed by Ganesh Ragavendra.

When was the song released?

Chennai Anthem was released on September 4, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Chennai Anthem from Mathil Mel Poonai is a lively tribute to the city of Chennai, showcasing its vibrant culture and energy. With Simbu's powerful vocals, the track evokes a sense of pride and joy among listeners. The upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics make it perfect for celebrations and parties. This anthem encapsulates the essence of Chennai, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chennai Anthem is a vibrant celebration of the spirit of Chennai, brought to life by the dynamic vocals of Simbu. This energetic track from the movie Mathil Mel Poonai captures the essence of the city with its catchy beats and lively lyrics. Experience the pulse of Chennai through this unforgettable anthem that resonates with every local's pride.
stanzaMeanings: This is a place where people come to live, and it’s a place where food is served abundantly. You should rise above and shine.
Hey buddy, the right time has come, let’s celebrate and enjoy together.
Hey buddy, we need to go and enjoy some snacks, let’s go out in the daytime.
This is a place where people come to live, and it’s a place where food is served abundantly. Hey buddy, you should rise above and shine.
The people of this place are good and knowledgeable, but they have no close relationships, yet they are caring and helpful.
When it comes to speaking English, we don’t understand anything, our English teacher is not teaching properly.
Dance, sing, and enjoy, keep moving around, even if it’s a busy day, don’t stop having fun.
Let’s go, let’s go, let’s go, the place is lively and full of energy, it’s a vibrant atmosphere everywhere.
This is a place where people come to live, and it’s a place where food is served abundantly.
Look around, we’ve come to a place where we can’t even find a way to earn money, we need to see what’s happening in the area.
What can I say, mom and dad, in this place, wearing cowboy jeans is not a big deal anymore.
Everywhere is full, with bills and stones, and thorns, it’s all crowded and busy.
Stop, stop, don’t be careless, don’t forget to say what’s important, you should also enjoy the fun in the crowd.
This is a place where people come to live, and it’s a place where food is served abundantly. Hey buddy, you should rise above and shine.
